title: orthiopteris firma
intro: Orthiopteris firma, also known as the firm strap fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Orthiopteris firma include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be dried and used in a variety of herbal blends.
